title: Pharmacy Technicians
description: Prepare medications under the direction of a pharmacist. May measure, mix, count out, label, and record amounts and dosages of medications according to prescription orders.

tasks.text: Receive written prescription or refill requests and verify that information is complete and accurate.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enter prescription information into computer databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish or maintain patient profiles, including lists of medications taken by individual patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain proper storage and security conditions for drugs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive and store incoming supplies, verify quantities against invoices, check for outdated medications in current inventory, and inform supervisors of stock needs and shortages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer telephones, responding to questions or requests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist customers by answering simple questions, locating items, or referring them to the pharmacist for medication information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate cash registers to accept payment from customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Price and file prescriptions that have been filled.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix pharmaceutical preparations, according to written prescriptions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order, label, and count stock of medications, chemicals, or supplies and enter inventory data into computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and help maintain equipment or work areas and sterilize glassware, according to prescribed methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepack bulk medicines, fill bottles with prescribed medications, and type and affix labels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute charges for medication or equipment dispensed to hospital patients and enter data in computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and process medical insurance claim forms and records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Transfer medication from vials to the appropriate number of sterile, disposable syringes, using aseptic techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Restock intravenous (IV) supplies and add measured drugs or nutrients to IV solutions under sterile conditions to prepare IV packs for various uses, such as chemotherapy medication.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supply and monitor robotic machines that dispense medicine into containers and label the containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Deliver medications or pharmaceutical supplies to patients, nursing stations, or surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain and merchandise home healthcare products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Price stock and mark items for sale.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
